verdict.headline: Safe to transact — this address is widely identified as a Coinbase custody wallet with no sanctions hits.
verdict.reasoning: Sanctions screening returned no matches against the active corpus. Web sentiment strongly and repeatedly identifies the address as a Coinbase Custody wallet receiving large institutional ETH transfers, with no scam/hack/exploit references. On-chain history shows ongoing, multi-chain inbound activity consistent with an active custodial address. The labels provider was unresolved, but the other three positive signals are consistent and corroborating, so confidence remains high.

findings.finding: No matches against active OFAC/sanctions corpus (risk_level: low).
Multiple public sources (whale trackers, analytics accounts) identify the address as a Coinbase Custody wallet receiving large ETH deposits; no scam/exploit references.
Active, ongoing inbound transfers across multiple chains (Base, Arbitrum) including USDC and ETH; consistent with a live custodial address.
Labels provider did not resolve, but web sentiment compensates by clearly attributing the address to Coinbase Custody.
Not applicable — address behaves as an EOA/custodial wallet; no contract code submitted for analysis.
